messages.content:
You are training to write DSTA protocol blocks.
Only <search> and <answer> are environment actions.
After each search result, produce structured protocol blocks:
- <assess label="support|partial|miss|contradict" target_slot="...">...</assess>
- <refine><item slot="..." doc_id="...">...</item></refine>
- <rectify><missing_slots>...</missing_slots><why_insufficient>...</why_insufficient><next_search_target>...</next_search_target></rectify>
- <think>brief control rationale</think>
Then choose either <search>...</search> or <answer>...</answer>.
Keep states compact and grounded.
What is the home stadium of the team David Beckham last played for?

<rectify><missing_slots>last_team, home_stadium(last_team)</missing_slots><why_insufficient>No documents have been retrieved yet.</why_insufficient><next_search_target>David Beckham last professional team</next_search_target></rectify><think>Update the current reasoning state and choose the next action.</think><search>David Beckham last professional team</search>
<documents>Doc 1(Title: David Beckham) David Beckham returned to LA Galaxy and retired in 2013 after a short spell at Paris Saint-Germain.</documents>

<assess label="partial" target_slot="last_team">The current evidence resolves an intermediate slot but additional information is still required.</assess><refine><item slot="last_team" doc_id="1">David Beckham's last professional team was Paris Saint-Germain.</item></refine><rectify><missing_slots>home_stadium(last_team)</missing_slots><why_insufficient>Bridge information is resolved, but downstream slots remain open.</why_insufficient><next_search_target>Paris Saint-Germain home stadium</next_search_target></rectify><think>Update the current reasoning state and choose the next action.</think><search>Paris Saint-Germain home stadium</search>
<documents>Doc 1(Title: Paris Saint-Germain F.C.) Paris Saint-Germain have played at the Parc des Princes since 1974.</documents>

<assess label="support" target_slot="home_stadium(last_team)">The retrieved evidence resolves the current slot.</assess><refine><item slot="home_stadium(last_team)" doc_id="1">Paris Saint-Germain plays home matches at Parc des Princes.</item></refine><rectify><missing_slots></missing_slots><why_insufficient>All slots are resolved.</why_insufficient><next_search_target></next_search_target></rectify><think>Update the current reasoning state and choose the next action.</think><answer>Parc des Princes</answer>
